role_summary: the fund accountant manages accounting and reporting for investment funds, ensuring  accuracy and regulatory comp liance.
responsibilities: • maintain books of accounts for mutual funds / aifs   • calculate nav and fund performance metrics   • prepare investor reports and regulatory filings   • coordinate with custodians, fund managers, and auditors   • ensure compliance with sebi and regulatory requirements   • support fund audits and reviews
qualifications: • ca with fund accounting experience   • knowledge of fund structures and regulations   • strong accounting and reconciliation skills
